ensemble_recipe.rationale: only one method (beta) beats baseline; per spec, ensemble requires two complementary methods, not run
ensemble_recipe.baseline_used_for_eligibility: platt_val_cal_dev_avg (parametric — apples-to-apples vs methods 1-3 on the val fold; iso baseline cannot be used on val because it memorizes the val labels)

calibration_block.convention: P_calibrated = numpy.interp(clip(raw, x[0], x[-1]), x, y) reproduces sklearn IsotonicRegression(out_of_bounds='clip', y_min=0, y_max=1).transform; matches LoadedDualHeadModel._apply_isotonic

pass_check_results.name: spearman_long>=0.95
pass_check_results.detail: holdout spearman(raw, cal) long=1.0000 vs floor 0.95

pass_check_results.name: spearman_short>=0.95
pass_check_results.detail: holdout spearman(raw, cal) short=1.0000 vs floor 0.95

calibration_block.convention: P_calibrated = sigmoid(a*log(p) + b*log(1-p) + c) with safe-log (eps=1e-7); fit by scipy L-BFGS-B on val NLL

pass_check_results.name: spearman_long>=0.95

pass_check_results.detail: holdout spearman(raw, cal) short=1.0000 vs floor 0.95

calibration_block.convention: P_calibrated = sigmoid(margin / T) where margin = booster.predict(X, raw_score=True); T fit by scipy minimize_scalar over [0.05, 20.0] on val NLL

pass_check_results.name: spearman_long>=0.95
pass_check_results.detail: holdout spearman(raw, cal) long=1.0000 vs floor 0.95

pass_check_results.name: spearman_short>=0.95
pass_check_results.detail: holdout spearman(raw, cal) short=1.0000 vs floor 0.95

calibration_block.convention: P_calibrated = (1 - alpha)*p_raw + alpha*base_rate; alpha fit by scipy minimize_scalar over [0, 1] on val 10-bin cal_dev. base_rate = inner-train per-head positive rate

fit_notes: shrink_short_alpha≈0 (no-op; shrinkage not appropriate for the under-confidence direction)

ensemble.skip_rationale: only one method (beta) beats baseline; per spec, ensemble requires two complementary methods, not run

aggregate_decision.headline: calibration not fixed but signal financially strong; at least one PARTIAL_OPERATOR_DECISION method exists
